reviews.comment:
fuimos a cargar combustible tiene casi siempre un poco de espera por la cantidad de automoviles  que cargan pero tiene varios surtidores que hace que sea rapido el despacho los Playeros muy atentos y se puede pagar con las aplicacion

(Translated by Google)
We went to fill up with fuel; there's almost always a bit of a wait due to the number of cars filling up, but it has several pumps which makes the service quick. The attendants are very attentive, and you can pay with the app.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias Alberto por el comentario muy amable

reviews.comment:
YPF FULL, jueves 15.6 20.43 hs entro y de mala manera el empleado me dice: estamos cerrando! Respondo, ok me llevo el café y cerrá tranquilo. Haceme un cortado x favor en esta medida (el mas pequeño, similar a un jarrito), cuánto es? 800 pesos. Me pareció carísimo, miro la cartelera y veo 550, le digo, responde q ese precio es para tomar ahí. ok, lo tomo acá. Estamos cerrando ... chau, buenas noches, cerrá tranquilo, dsps metete el café en el orrrr.. 20.46 hs.
YPF FULL del ACA Central, Av. del Libertador ...
tal vez hubiera tenido mejor suerte en un YPF FULL de los de la publicidad, los de abiertos 24 hs., con empleados q no estafen al cliente ni los echen ni los estafen,  amables y sonrientes, diligentes y serviciales.
Lo seguiré buscando ...

(Translated by Google)
YPF FULL, Thursday, June 15th, 8:43 PM. I walk in and the employee rudely tells me: "We're closing!" I reply, "Okay, I'll take my coffee and you can close up in peace. Make me a cortado, please, in this size (the smallest, similar to a small cup), how much is it?" 800 pesos. I thought it was very expensive, I look at the price board and see 550, I tell him, he replies that that price is for drinking there. Okay, I'll drink it here. We're closing... bye, good night, close up in peace, then shove your coffee up your ass..." 8:46 PM.
YPF FULL at the ACA Central, Av. del Libertador...
Maybe I would have had better luck at one of those YPF FULL stations advertised, the 24-hour ones, with employees who don't rip off customers or get fired, friendly and smiling, diligent and helpful.
I'll keep looking for one...

reviewReply.comment: Gracias luis le pedimos mil disculpas y tomaremos las medidas y averguaciones del caso saludos y disculpas
